product_information.product_name: Dr. Organic Manuka Honey Shampoo 265 ML
product_information.description:
Het Product
This Manuka Honey Shampoo is a gentle, nourishing cleanser designed to care for your hair and scalp every day. Perfect for dry and normal hair, it helps replenish moisture, restore shine, and leave hair feeling revitalised. Enriched with organic manuka honey, it maximises the honey’s natural restorative properties to support healthy, nourished hair. The gentle formula cleanses without stripping essential oils, leaving hair soft, smooth, and manageable. With regular use, hair feels hydrated, refreshed, and naturally radiant, ideal for daily care.
Ingredienten
Aqua, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice powder†, Ammonium lauryl sulfate, Glycerin, Caprylyl/capryl glucoside, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Sea salt (Maris sal), *MEL (KEY EXTRACT: Manuka Honey)†, Lauryl glucoside, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Parfum, Citric acid, Sodium phytate, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Linalool. † certified organic, 10% organic, 98% natural origin
